name: Gray Dot Dog Doll Car Carrier for 14" - 16" Dolls - Gigglescape™: Baby Doll Car Seat Accessory, Recycled Materials, Includes Seat
description:
Your child can take their favorite doll with them wherever they go in this Dot Dog Doll Car Carrier from Gigglescape™. This doll car carrier is designed in gray with dots and a cute dog face with ears on the top hood plus a hanging star accent to take a doll or stuffed animal for a ride in fun style. Plus, the carrier's buckle straps ensure that their doll is securely fastened while they're out and about. Compatible with most 14–16 inch dolls, the car carrier is designed for children ages two and up.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
